options.content:
## Graphyard Overview

Quick Access:
- [Host Filesystems](/d/graphyard-host-infrastructure/graphyard-host-filesystems)
- [Host Network](/d/graphyard-host-network/graphyard-host-network)
- [Fractal Thermals](/d/graphyard-fractal-thermals/fractal-thermals)
- [Room Climate](/d/graphyard-room-climate/graphyard-room-climate)
- [Device Thermals](/d/graphyard-device-thermals/graphyard-device-thermals)
- [Device Network](/d/graphyard-device-network/graphyard-device-network)
- [HTTP Page Probes](/d/graphyard-http-page-probes/graphyard-http-page-probes)
- [Fractal Storage](/d/graphyard-fractal-storage/fractal-storage)
- [Logyard Overview](/d/logyard-home/logyard-overview)

Tip: click **Home** in the left sidebar any time to return here.

Domain boundaries:
- **Host Filesystems**: generic host filesystem usage and latest mountpoint values
- **Host Network**: generic host interface throughput (receive/transmit)
- **Fractal Thermals**: Fractal-specific host temperatures and fan RPM from the local thermal endpoint
- **Room Climate**: `environment_sensor` temperature/humidity only
- **Device Thermals**: `network_device` temperature only
- **Device Network**: `network_device` traffic only (for example FRITZ!Box WAN and UniFi uplinks)
- **HTTP Page Probes**: public page latency and probe status for service-subject URLs measured from the agent host
- **Fractal Storage**: Fractal-specific logical storage view (`rootfs`, `fast`, `tank`, USB backup drive state)
- **Logyard Overview**: journald logs in Loki for first-look triage and service-level drilldown

This split avoids mixing filesystem, thermals, and network views across host and infrastructure-device dashboards.
